purpose.title: Goal of the game
purpose.content: The goal of the game is to place all your tiles on the table by creating combinations.

card.title: Tile
card.content: A tile has a color (red, blue, yellow, black) and is numbered from 1 to 13.

joker.title: Joker
joker.content:
There are two jokers, they can replace any tile.

Their color does not matter.

suite.title: Combination - Run
suite.content: A run is a combination of at least 3 tiles of the same color in consecutive order.

serie.title: Combination - Group
serie.content: A group is a combination of at least 3 tiles of the same number but different colors.

first_turn.title: First turn
first_turn.content:
On your first turn, you must play at least 30 points (sum of the numbers on the tiles).
You cannot interact with tiles already on the table.

If you cannot play 30 points, you draw a tile and end your turn.

examples.title: Some examples:
examples.invalid: If you only play this combination, you only have 27 out of 30 points.
examples.valid: Here, you have 33 points, so you can play.

first_turn.reminder: You have played {playedPoints} point(s) out of the {neededPoints} needed to play.

turn.title: How a turn works
turn.content:
You can place combinations on the table and modify existing combinations.

If you don't place anything, you draw a tile and end your turn.

combination_modification.title: Modifying a combination
combination_modification.content:
You can add/remove tiles from an existing combination, as long as it remains valid.

This allows you to create new combinations and place your tiles.

examples.title: Some examples:
examples.add: You can add a black 11, or a joker
examples.remove: You can remove the 10 or the 13, leaving 3 cards
examples.replace: You can replace the joker with a green 4, and reuse it elsewhere
examples.split: You can split to make 5-6 and 7-8-9, then add a 7 after the 6
